articles.description: Follow live text updates and listen to BBC radio commentary from Augusta National as round two of the 90th Masters gets under way.
articles.title: The Masters 2026 LIVE: Round two leaderboard, golf tee times, scores, radio & updates from Augusta

articles.description: Liverpool manager Arne Slot insists he feels "complete support" from the club's hierarchy and fans despite a run of poor on-field performances and growing discontent about his future as manager
articles.title: I feel complete support from owners and fans - Slot

articles.description: Scotland's Robert MacIntyre could face disciplinary action at the Masters after an angry gesture at the 15th green during a quadruple bogey.
articles.title: The Masters 2026: Robert MacIntyre could face action after angry Masters gesture

articles.description: Key voices from boxing weigh in on the big questions surrounding heavyweight Tyson Fury's latest comeback.
articles.title: Tyson Fury vs Arslanbek Makhmudov: Key questions answered

articles.description: Premier League live: News conferences and build-up as Arne Slot, Pep Guardiola, Mikel Arteta, Roberto De Zerbi and others speak before the return of the top flight.
articles.title: Premier League LIVE build-up, news conferences and predictions: Arne Slot speaking

articles.description: With the pomp and celebration of his Masters victory finished, Rory McIlroy reminded everyone he is back at Augusta to win again.
articles.title: Masters 2026: Rory McIlroy makes confident start to Augusta defence

articles.description: Bronny James passes to parent LeBron for the first son-to-father assist in NBA history as the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Golden State Warriors.
articles.title: NBA: Bronny James assists father LeBron in Los Angeles Lakers win

articles.description: Follow live text updates and listen to BBC Radio commentaries from nine games across Divisions One and Two of the County Championship.
articles.title: County Championship Cricket LIVE: Scores & radio commentaries from nine games

articles.description: Teenager Mika Stojsavljevic stuns Talia Gibson, ranked more than 200 places above her, in straight sets to give Great Britain a 1-0 lead over Australia in the Billie Jean King Cup in Melbourne
articles.title: Billie Jean King Cup: GB teen Stojsavljevic stuns Australia's Gibson on debut

articles.description: Al-Ahly goalkeeper Mohamed El-Shenawy banned for four games for striking a referee on the head following an Egyptian Pro League match.
articles.title: Egypt goalkeeper Mohamed El-Shenawy banned for striking referee
